toast.reset_to_default_template: Dwok cen i template me akwaka
toast.saved_to_session_history: Ogwoki i tic me cawa ma okato!
toast.scenario_generation_failed_try_aga: Yubo me lok pa kit ma timme pe ocobbe — tem doki
toast.session_saved_n_independent: Tic me cawa ogwoki! N% kekene
toast.session_saved_ns_n_total_responses: Tic me cawa ogwoki! Ns, N lagam ducu
toast.share_code_copied_to_clipboard: Code me nyutu okopi i clipboard!
toast.simulation_started_you_are_now_the: Pwony me yubo ocako — in dong itye lapwony 🎭
toast.speech_recognition_not_supported_i: Niango pa dwan pe ki teko i browser man
toast.switched_to_n_no_data_loaded: Olokke i N (data mo pe oloadi)
toast.you_have_unsaved_changes_consider_: 💡 Itye ki aloka ma pe ogwoki — par ki gwoko tic ni.
toast.autofilled_from_phase_tagged_entri: Opongo pi ngene ki i entries ma kiketo phase tags.
toast.need_2_baseline_2_intervention_ent: Mito 2 baseline ki 2 intervention entries ma kibedo ki phase tags.
toast.snapshot_rejected_entries: Okwango ${rejectedAbc + rejectedObs} entries ma pe tye atir (timestamp aye pe nyo kit pa field me kupore). ${validAbc.length + validObs.length} entries ma atir gugwoki pi ngiyo.
toast.share_code_too_large: Snapshot dwong adwong pi share code (${encoded.length.toLocaleString()} chars, kom 5,000). Tic ki 💾 Cwal Snapshot kakare.
ui.add_abc_entries_before_generating_a_r: Med ABC entries ma peya iyubo report.
ui.add_abc_entries_to_see_progress_over_: Med ABC entries me neno wek poto i kare
ui.add_abc_entries_to_see_visual_trend_d: Med ABC entries me neno data me anenne pa trend.
ui.add_connections_to_build_the_relation: Med kube me yubo map me wat.
ui.add_data_points_above_or_paste_csv_da: Med data points malo nyo cik CSV data me cako.
ui.ai_is_analyzing_your_transcript: AI tye ka ngiyo transcript ni...
ui.ai_will_generate_visual_scenes_during: AI bi yubo kabedo ma kineno i kare me lok (mito Imagen)
ui.aigenerated_meeting_preparation_packe: Lupok me yiko pa rwom ma AI oyubo, ki i data me kit pa tim
ui.aipowered_pattern_analysis_with_proac: Ngiyo pa kit ma timme ki teko pa AI, ki yore me gengo kacel
ui.aisynthesized_behavioral_profile_from: Profile me kit pa tim ma AI oribo woko ki i kakube ducu pa data
ui.avoid_these_frequently_seen_errors_to: Geng bal ma kineno polpol man wek kit pa tim odoki maber.
ui.behaviors_can_serve_multiple_function: Kit pa tim twero tic ki ti POL. Cok data marom (10+ ABC entries) ma peya itieko hypothesis ni. Tic ki gin tic me AI Pattern Analysis pi moko ma odok ki i data.
ui.break_skills_into_teachable_steps_wit: Pok diro i atematic mapore me pwonyo ki chaining ki ngene pa prompt
ui.build_your_behavior_analysis_skills_s: Yub diro ni me ngiyo kit pa tim, atematic atematic
ui.calculate_tauu_nap_and_pnd_to_quantif: Kwan Tau-U, NAP, ki PND me moko ber pa intervention.
ui.choose_the_right_differential_reinfor: Yer yore me differential reinforcement ma atir
ui.click_ai_generate_checklist_to_create: Dii "AI Generate Checklist" me yubo gin ma kilubo BIP
ui.click_load_student_workspaces_and_sel: Dii "Load Student Workspaces" ki yer .json files mapol ma kigwoko ki i BehaviorLens
ui.collect_some_abc_data_first_to_genera: Cok mukene ABC data kong me yubo lupok ma tye ki tere.
ui.create_your_first_replacement_behavio: Yub plan ni mukwongo me replacement behavior.
ui.crf_every_time_fr2_fr3_fr5_vr5_vr8_na: CRF (cawa ducu) → FR-2 → FR-3 → FR-5 → VR-5 → VR-8 → Reinforcement pa kit pa lobo
ui.define_the_behaviors_settings_or_stud: Tit kit pa tim, kabedo, nyo lupwonye pi staggered intervention.
ui.describe_your_research_question_and_l: Tit lapeny me yenyo ni ka iwek AI omii tam pa design maber.
ui.discrete_trial_training_with_mastery_: Discrete Trial Training ki ngene pa mastery ki auto-advance
ui.document_whether_interventions_are_im: Coc ka ce intervention kitiyo lubo kit ma kiyubo
ui.enter_data_or_record_sessions_to_gene: Ket data nyo gwok tic me cawa me yubo cumulative record.
ui.family_voices_are_powerful_share_your: Dwan pa jo me ot tye ki teko. Nyut nen ni mukwongo!
ui.functional_communication_training_pla: Gin tic me yiko pa Functional Communication Training
ui.generate_a_multiweek_intervention_pla: Yub plan me intervention pa cabit mapol ma olubu data me ABC ma icoko ki ngiyo pa AI.
ui.generate_a_professional_printready_pr: Yub report me poto ma yom-yom, ma oyiko pi printing, ki charts, lupok me data, ki tam pa AI. Diing acel keken pi cwalo PDF ki i browser print.
ui.generate_a_unique_scenario_tailored_t: Yub lok pa kit ma timme mapatpat ma oyubo lubo mito ni me pwony.
ui.generate_compliant_iep_behavioral_goa: Yub goal me kit pa tim me IEP ma olubu cik, ki i data me nen, ki rwom ma tye kombedi, SMART goals, ki ngene pa poto.
ui.generate_iepready_progress_monitoring: Yub waraga me ngene pa poto me IEP ki i data me kit pa tim ma icoko.
ui.generate_tailored_recommendations_bas: Yub tam ma kiyubo lubo data me kit pa tim ki jo ma kiyero.
ui.gently_surfaces_patterns_for_reflecti: Nyutu kit ma timme ki mwol pi tam — dongo, pe roc
ui.get_ai_coaching_on_data_collection_qu: Nong pwony pa AI i kom ber pa coko data. Nongo bal, mio tam me doko maber, kwano data ni.
ui.how_often_and_when_to_deliver_reinfor: Pol kacel ki kare me mio reinforcement. Tic ki gin tic me Token Board me tic ki schedule magi i tic.
ui.identify_temporal_patterns_in_behavio: Nong kit ma timme pa cawa i kom kit pa tim
ui.import_student_profiles_or_historical: Kel profile pa lupwonye nyo ABC data me con ki i CSV files. Cak ki lupwonye 10-15 i cawa acel.
ui.load_multiple_student_workspace_files: Load workspace files pa lupwonye mapol me poro kit pa tim, teko, ki trend i nge gi i kabedo acel.
ui.map_target_behaviors_to_functionally_: Rib kit pa tim ma kineno ki kit pa tim me replacement ma tic rom
ui.measure_time_between_stimulus_present: Pim kare ma tye i kin nyuto pa stimulus ki lagam me kit pa tim
ui.modify_the_environment_to_prevent_beh: Loke kabedo me gengo kit pa tim ma peya gucake
ui.natural_language_abc_entry: ABC Entry ki Leb me Lobo
ui.need_at_least_3_abc_entries_for_patte: Mito 3 ABC entries me nongo kit ma timme.
ui.need_at_least_5_abc_entries_for_patte: Mito 5 ABC entries me ngiyo kit ma timme.
ui.no_abc_entries_to_check_yet_start_col: ABC entries pe tye me ngiyo pud. Cak coko data kong!
ui.no_behavioral_data_recorded: Data me kit pa tim pe ogwoki
ui.no_contacts_logged_yet_consistent_com: Kube mo pe ogwoki pud. Tic me kube ma pe lokke yubo gen!
ui.no_entries_yet_tap_log_a_behavior_to_: Entries pe tye pud. Dii "Log a Behavior" me cako!
ui.no_reflections_yet_tap_the_button_abo: Tam pe tye pud. Dii button malo me ngiyo komi keni!
ui.no_session_data_recorded_yet: Data me tic me cawa pe ogwoki pud.
ui.no_team_notes_yet_start_the_conversat: Coc pa team pe tye pud. Cak lok!
ui.or_explore_the_pd_learning_path: Nyo kwany yoo me pwonye me PD →
ui.paste_one_value_per_line_supports_for: Cik value acel i pol acel. Tero kit magi: "5", "Session 1: 5", nyo "1,5"
ui.please_use_chrome_edge_or_safari_for_: Tim ber tic ki Chrome, Edge, nyo Safari me input me dwan.
ui.practice_clinical_reasoning_with_aige: Tem tam me clinical reasoning ki case studies ma AI oyubo. Nong adwogi ma rom ki ngec pa lwak i kom lagam ni.
ui.prebuilt_scenarios_covering_the_4_fun: Lok pa kit ma timme ma oyubo woko, ma olwoko ti ducu 4 pa kit pa tim. Tic woko ki internet — AI pe mito.
ui.publicationstandard_singlecase_design: Single-case design graphs ma rom me coc i waraga
ui.read_through_the_module_content_above: Kwan gin ma tye i module malo, ka in dii Complete piny.
ui.realtime_calming_tools_for_inthemomen: Gin tic me kwero komo me kare manono pi konyo i kareni
ui.record_sessions_with_the_session_data: Gwok tic me cawa ki Session Data Tracker, nyo lok i mode me Manual Entry.
ui.remember_cultural_humility_is_a_lifel: Par ni: mwol me cultural humility en tic me kwo ducu. Tam ducu yubo in lapwony ma kit pa pore matek.
ui.review_your_abc_data_collection_for_c: Ngi coko pa ABC data ni i kom ka ce otieko ki ber pa nene
ui.select_a_research_design_to_structure: Yer research design me yubo kit pa coko data ni
ui.share_workspace_data_with_team_member: Nyut workspace data ki jo me team. Anenne ma olubu role yenyo data ma rom pi BCBAs, lupwony, ki lunyodo.
ui.speak_your_observations_naturally_ai_: Lok nen ni i yo me akwaka. AI bi nongo ABC entries ki i transcript ni.
ui.stepbystep_scripts_for_healing_relati: Coc ma atematic me cango wat ki yubo lwak
ui.systematic_reinforcer_identification_: Yenyo reinforcer ki kit ma olubu cik ki yore ma cik moko
ui.test_your_behavioral_analysis_knowled: Tem ngec ni me ngiyo kit pa tim — 80% me nongo badge ni
ui.track_behavior_frequency_over_time_wi: Lub pol pa kit pa tim i kare ki aim lines, aloka me phase, ki ngiyo pa trend.
ui.track_behaviors_at_home_using_simple_: Lub kit pa tim i ot ki leb ma yot, me nino ducu. Man konyo latin ni\
ui.track_your_feelings_earn_badges_and_b: Lub winyo komi, nong badges, ki yub streaks!
ui.transform_deficitbased_language_into_: Lok leb ma nyutu bal woko, dok leb ma nyutu teko
ui.type_or_paste_your_observation_notes_: Coc nyo cik coc me nen ni i English me nino ducu. AI bi yubogi i ABC entries ma atir.
ui.use_these_criteria_when_examining_you: Tic ki cik magi ka itye ka ngiyo graph ni:
ui.use_this_flow_to_hypothesize_the_func: Tic ki yoo man me yubo hypothesis i kom ti pa kit pa tim ma tek.
ui.visual_multitiered_system_of_supports: Anenne pa MTSS. Ket lupwonye i tier, nong tam pa AI i kom kabedo.
